user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my daily attendance records in a list, so that I can review my work hours and status per day
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Attendance Details screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Date, Planned work, Actual start and end time, At work, breaks, Effective duration and Status

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my attendance by a From and To date range, so that I can review a specific period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Attendance Details screen; When I set a From and To date and click Search; Then only attendance records within that range are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to quickly see today's attendance data, so that I can check my current day's status without setting a date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Attendance Details screen; When I select Show today data; Then the list shows only today's attendance record

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my selection and start a new query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied date filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the default view is restored

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the attendance list, so that I can see the latest recorded data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Attendance Details screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the most current attendance records

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see the breakdown of my time by category such as Official visit, Client location, Personal off and WFH, so that I understand how my working hours are allocated
acceptance_criteria: Given attendance records exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows Official visit, Client location, Personal off, WFH, break count and break duration values
